title: Endeavour MTR
description:
THIS MODPACK IS NO LONGER IN USE: Check description
Modpack for an minecraft server named Endeavour MTR , please do not use this for other minecraft servers or singleplayer.
body:
THIS MODPACK IS NO LONGER IN USE: https://modrinth.com/modpack/endeavour-mtr-reopened/

~~# **Ｂｕｃｋｈａｍ**~~

~~**Buckham is an new server, with two purposes:**~~
﻿
~~1: Make an REAL world , with real countries, using the MTR Mod and other mods.~~
﻿
~~2: Give the liberty for the different countries to build whatever would Be better to their country.~~
﻿
~~Details:~~
~~Buckham is an Minecraft server with several countries, with one Agency doing the most possible to keep peace between countries and join the World together: the United Nations or UN.~~ 
﻿
~~You can join to become a citizen/builder of an existing country, or create your own! 
The possibilities are endless!~~
